# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.

Validate file type/content, control storage paths, and apply safe size and processing limits.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: User File Upload Manager
 * Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents with security validation
 * Version: 1.0
 * Author: Your Name
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class User_File_Upload_Manager {
    
    private $upload_dir;
    private $allowed_image_types = array('image/jpeg', 'image/jpg', 'image/png', 'image/gif');
    private $allowed_document_types = array('application/pdf', 'application/msword', 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document');
    private $max_file_size = 5242880; // 5MB
    private $max_image_size = 2097152; // 2MB
    
    public function __construct() {
        $upload_base = wp_upload_dir();
        $this->upload_dir = $upload_base['basedir'] . '/user-files/';
        
        add_action('init', array($this, 'init'));
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_scripts'));
        add_shortcode('user_file_upload', array($this, 'render_upload_form'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_handle_file_upload', array($this, 'handle_file_upload'));
    }
    
    public function init() {
        if (!file_exists($this->upload_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($this->upload_dir);
            file_put_contents($this->upload_dir . '.htaccess', 'Options -Indexes' . PHP_EOL . 'deny from all');
            file_put_contents($this->upload_dir . 'index.php', '<?php // Silence is golden');
        }
    }
    
    public function enqueue_scripts() {
        wp_enqueue_style('user-file-upload-css', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'style.css', array(), '1.0');
        wp_enqueue_script('user-file-upload-js', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'script.js', array('jquery'), '1.0', true);
        wp_localize_script('user-file-upload-js', 'userFileUpload', array(
            'ajax_url' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
            'nonce' => wp_create_nonce('user_file_upload_nonce')
        ));
    }
    
    public function render_upload_form() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>You must be logged in to upload files.</p>';
        }
        
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $user_files = $this->get_user_files($user_id);
        
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="user-file-upload-container">
            <h3>Upload Profile Picture</h3>
            <form id="profile-picture-form" class="file-upload-form" enctype="multipart/form-data">
                <input type="file" name="profile_picture" id="profile_picture" accept="image/*" required>
                <input type="hidden" name="file_type" value="profile_picture">
                <button type="submit" class="upload-btn">Upload Profile Picture</button>
                <span class="upload-status"></span>
            </form>
            
            <h3>Upload Documents</h3>
            <form id="document-form" class="file-upload-form" enctype="multipart/form-data">
                <input type="file" name="document" id="document" accept=".pdf,.doc,.docx" required>
                <label for="document_label">Document Label:</label>
                <input type="text" name="document_label" id="document_label" placeholder="e.g., ID Card, Resume" required>
                <input type="hidden" name="file_type" value="document">
                <button type="submit" class="upload-btn">Upload Document</button>
                <span class="upload-status"></span>
            </form>
            
            <h3>Your Files</h3>
            <div id="user-files-list">
                <?php echo $this->render_user_files($user_files); ?>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
    
    private function get_user_files($user_id) {
        $files = get_user_meta($user_id, 'uploaded_files', true);
        return is_array($files) ? $files : array();
    }
    
    private function render_user_files($files) {
        if (empty($files)) {
            return '<p>No files uploaded yet.</p>';
        }
        
        $output = '<ul class="user-files-list">';
        foreach ($files as $file) {
            $file_url = $this->get_secure_file_url($file['filename']);
            $output .= '<li>';
            $output .= '<strong>' . esc_html($file['label']) . '</strong> - ';
            $output .= '<span>' . esc_html($file['original_name']) . '</span> ';
            $output .= '<span class="file-date">(' . date('Y-m-d H:i', $file['uploaded']) . ')</span> ';
            $output .= '<a href="' . esc_url($file_url) . '" class="download-link" target="_blank">View</a>';
            $output .= '</li>';
        }
        $output .= '</ul>';
        
        return $output;
    }
    
    private function get_secure_file_url($filename) {
        return add_query_arg(array(
            'action' => 'download_user_file',
            'file' => urlencode($filename),
            'nonce' => wp_create_nonce('download_file_' . $filename)
        ), admin_url('admin-ajax.php'));
    }
    
    public function handle_file_upload() {
        check_ajax_referer('user_file_upload_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'You must be logged in to upload files.'));
        }
        
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $file_type = sanitize_text_field($_POST['file_type']);
        
        if ($file_type === 'profile_picture') {
            $this->handle_profile_picture_upload($user_id);
        } elseif ($file_type === 'document') {
            $this->handle_document_upload($user_id);
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Invalid file type.'));
        }
    }
    
    private function handle_profile_picture_upload($user_id) {
        if (!isset($_FILES['profile_picture']) || $_FILES['profile_picture']['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'File upload error.'));
        }
        
        $file = $_FILES['profile_picture'];
        
        if ($file['size'] > $this->max_image_size) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'File size exceeds 2MB limit.'));
        }
        
        $validation = $this->validate_image_file($file);
        if (!$validation['valid']) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => $validation['message']));
        }
        
        $user_dir = $this->upload_dir . $user_id . '/';
        if (!file_exists($user_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_dir);
        }
        
        $file_extension = strtolower(pathinfo($file['name'], PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
        $new_filename = 'profile_' . time() . '_' . wp_generate_password(8, false) . '.' . $file_extension;
        $destination = $user_dir . $new_filename;
        
        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Failed to save file.'));
        }
        
        chmod($destination, 0644);
        
        $old_profile = get_user_meta($user_id, 'profile_picture', true);
        if ($old_profile && file_exists($user_dir . $old_profile)) {
            unlink($user_dir . $old_profile);
        }
        
        update_user_meta($user_id, 'profile_picture', $new_filename);
        
        $files = $this->get_user_files($user_id);
        $files[] = array(
            'filename' => $new_filename,
            'original_name' => sanitize_file_name($file['name']),
            'label' => 'Profile Picture',
            'type' => 'image',
            'uploaded' => time()
        );
        update_user_meta($user_id, 'uploaded_files', $files);
        
        wp_send_json_success(array(
            'message' => 'Profile picture uploaded successfully.',
            'files_html' => $this->render_user_files($files)
        ));
    }
    
    private function handle_document_upload($user_id) {
        if (!isset($_FILES['document']) || $_FILES['document']['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'File upload error.'));
        }
        
        $file = $_FILES['document'];
        $document_label = sanitize_text_field($_POST['document_label']);
        
        if (empty($document_label)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Document label is required.'));
        }
        
        if ($file['size'] > $this->max_file_size) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'File size exceeds 5MB limit.'));
        }
        
        $validation = $this->validate_document_file($file);
        if (!$validation['valid']) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => $validation['message']));
        }
        
        $user_dir = $this->upload_dir . $user_id . '/';
        if (!file_exists($user_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_dir);
        }
        
        $file_extension = strtolower(pathinfo($file['name'], PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
        $new_filename = 'doc_' . time() . '_' . wp_generate_password(8, false) . '.' . $file_extension;
        $destination = $user_dir . $new_filename;
        
        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Failed to save file.'));
        }
        
        chmod($destination, 0644);
        
        $files = $this->get_user_files($user_id);
        $files[] = array(
            'filename' => $new_filename,
            'original_name' => sanitize_file_name($file['name']),
            'label' => $document_label,
            'type' => 'document',
            'uploaded' => time()
        );
        update_user_meta($user_id, 'uploaded_files', $files);
        
        wp_send_json_success(array(
            'message' => 'Document uploaded successfully.',
            'files_html' => $this->render_user_files($files)
        ));
    }
    
    private function validate_image_file($file) {
        $finfo = finfo_open(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
        $mime_type = finfo_file($finfo, $file['tmp_name']);
        finfo_close($finfo);
        
        if (!in_array($mime_type, $this->allowed_image_types)) {
            return array('valid' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid image file type. Only JPG, PNG, and GIF are allowed.');
        }
        
        $image_info = getimagesize($file['tmp_name']);
        if ($image_info === false) {
            return array('valid' => false, 'message' => 'File is not a valid image.');
        }
        
        if ($image_info[0] > 4000 || $image_info[1] > 4000) {
            return array('valid' => false, 'message' => 'Image dimensions too large. Maximum 4000x4000 pixels.');
        }
        
        $file_extension = strtolower(pathinfo($file['name'], PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
        $allowed_extensions = array('jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'gif');
        if (!in_array($file_extension, $allowed_extensions)) {
            return array('valid' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid file extension.');
        }
        
        return array('valid' => true);
    }
    
    private function validate_document_file($file) {
        $finfo = finfo_open(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
        $mime_type = finfo_file($finfo, $file['tmp_name']);
        finfo_close($finfo);
        
        if (!in_array($mime_type, $this->allowed_document_types)) {
            return array('valid' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid document type. Only PDF, DOC, and DOCX are allowed.');
        }
        
        $file_extension = strtolower(pathinfo($file['name'], PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
        $allowed_extensions = array('pdf', 'doc', 'docx');
        if (!in_array($file_extension, $allowed_extensions)) {
            return array('valid' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid file extension.');
        }
        
        $file_content = file_get_contents($file['tmp_name'], false, null, 0, 1024);
        
        if ($file_extension === 'pdf') {
            if (strpos($file_content, '%PDF') !== 0) {
                return array('valid' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid PDF file.');
            }
        } elseif ($file_extension === 'doc') {
            if (strpos($file_content, "\xD0\xCF\x11\xE0\xA1\xB1\x1A\xE1") !== 0) {
                return array('valid' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid DOC file.');
            }
        } elseif ($file_extension === 'docx') {
            if (strpos($file_content, "PK") !== 0) {
                return array('valid' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid DOCX file.');
            }
        }
        
        return array('valid' => true);
    }
}

new User_File_Upload_Manager();

add_action('wp_ajax_download_user_file', 'handle_secure_file_download');
add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_download_user_file', 'handle_secure_file_download');

function handle_secure_file_download() {
    if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
        wp_die('Unauthorized access.');
    }
    
    $filename = sanitize_file_name($_GET['file']);
    $nonce = $_GET['nonce'];
    
    if (!wp_verify_nonce($nonce, 'download_file_' . $filename)) {
        wp_die('Invalid security token.');
    }
    
    $user_id = get_current_user_id();
    $upload_base = wp_upload_dir();
    $file_path = $upload_base['basedir'] . '/user-files/' . $user_id . '/' . $filename;
    
    if (!file_exists($file_path)) {
        wp_die('File not found.');
    }
    
    $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, 'uploaded_files', true);
    $file_exists = false;
    foreach ($user_files as $file) {
        if ($file['filename'] === $filename) {
            $file_exists = true;
            break;
        }
    }
    
    if (!$file_exists) {
        wp_die('Unauthorized access to this file.');
    }
    
    $finfo = finfo_open(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
    $mime_type = finfo_file($finfo, $file_path);
    finfo_close($finfo);
    
    header('Content-Type: ' . $mime_type);
    header('Content-Disposition: inline; filename="' . basename($file_path) . '"');
    header('Content-Length: ' . filesize($file_path));
    header('Cache-Control: private, max-age=0, must-revalidate');
    header('Pragma: public');
    
    readfile($file_path);
    exit;
}
?>
